message:
chore(release): bump version to 0.1.4

Release 0.1.4 includes the following changes:

- fix(gemini-cli): use httpUrl for Streamable HTTP transport and remove type key
  The Gemini CLI integration now generates valid configuration using "httpUrl"
  instead of "url" for Streamable HTTP transport, and no longer injects the
  invalid "type": "http" key

- fix(codex-cli): correct TOML structure and notify hook handling
  Fixed TOML syntax by ensuring top-level keys appear before section headers,
  and corrected the notify hook to handle JSON payload as command argument

- fix(file-reservations): write Git artifacts on release and expire operations
  File reservation Git artifacts are now properly updated when reservations
  are released or expired, maintaining consistency between the database and
  the human-auditable Git archive

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 [project]
 name = "mcp-agent-mail"
-version = "0.1.3"
+version = "0.1.4"
 description = "Coordinated multi-agent messaging and coordination MCP server."
 readme = "README.md"
 requires-python = ">=3.14"
